title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF LIBERTAD AND SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOLORES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 571 / 55 OG No. 19, 3439 (May 11, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2125, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF LIBERTAD AND SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOLORES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following barrios are hereby created in the Municipality of Dolores, Province of Samar:

Barrio Libertad consisting of the sitios of Tanawan, Gape and Borac; and

Barrio San Isidro consisting of the sitios of Tangcop, Ojot, Japay, Deit and Maynipa.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959,
